title: Reis Messengers
wikitext:
[]: Rei's 'Messengers'             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 13, 2005 9:50 am [Split off from this monster -- Reichu] Not to introduce yet another point of contention, but upon what is the idea that the Rei are doing anything but simply melting people down based? They melt down the dead. http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-m26/m26_C319_comp.jpg They melt down the living. ...across the globe, too. To top it off, the Eva Series break their cores and free their souls, too...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 13, 2005 9:51 am Death has been dealt and souls liberated. The end of this phase is marked by a drop of blood. Immediately after this, the Red Earth Purification Ceremony begins. As a wave of red spreads across the world, dying everything in its wave... ...the souls are nudged towards their final desination. Not by any giggling school girls, but by a jungle of glowing crosses. As each one forms, it pushes the souls idling about in that area up into the higher air -- launching them, as it were. (It's more obvious from actually watching the crosses in action.) Upon this, GNR serves as a magnet, and the souls come flocking towards her in rivulets... http://i7.photobucket.com/albums/y289/Reichu/Souls/m26_C373_comp.jpg (Again, the flow of the souls is a bit more apparent when seen in action.) ...whereupon she directs them into the Black Moon through the hole on the top. (Although one perplexing bit is we see souls apparently entering her stigmata as well. In both storyboards and layout sketches, this is not the case... I personally am baffled as to this change.) At any rate, does anyone follow the message here? Am I making an ounce of sense? I tried explaining to ... SOMEBODY that the Meltdown Squad cannot be 'collecting souls' and bringing them to GNR, because they are only brought there AFTER the fact -- after meltdown has been achieved and the Rei-messengers have vanished, their duty fulfilled. Off-topic, but since I noticed this recently, I couldn't leave some of the preexisting conceptions uncommented on.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jul 13, 2005 10:45 am Being that somebody I feel compelled to chime in here. I don't clam to understand everything about eva, but i feel the need to one last time try to explain why I don't follow your theory. The red dots you say are soles appear around the black moon just before people start turning into tang. Now mind you we cut to Phantom Rei's standing around people turned into tang just after this, but when we see her actualy tang someone no red dot shows up when she does this. I.E. Aoba turns into liquid we dont se an aoba dot in his place. We do whowever see these dots often around Rei as she visits people. I sugggest they are more to show a manifestation of liliths/reis power, then to represent a sole. Remember the planit stays red the entire time, as well as coved in crosses. Crosses show the power of adam/the angels and maybe the red the power of lilith? reichu wrote: Not to introduce yet another point of contention, but upon what is the idea that the Rei are doing anything but simply melting people down based?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 13, 2005 11:58 am Reichu wrote: At any rate, does anyone follow the message here? Am I making an ounce of sense? I tried explaining to ... SOMEBODY that the Meltdown Squad cannot be 'collecting souls' and bringing them to GNR, because they are only brought there AFTER the fact -- after meltdown has been achieved and the Rei-messengers have vanished, their duty fulfilled.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 13, 2005 12:31 pm DatDude wrote: The red dots you say are soles appear around the black moon just before people start turning into tang.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 13, 2005 12:34 pm Remember the planit stays red the entire time, as well as coved in crosses. Crosses show the power of adam/the angels and maybe the red the power of lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Jul 13, 2005 12:35 pm Reichu wrote: Not to introduce yet another point of contention, but upon what is the idea that the Rei are doing anything but simply melting people down based? They melt down the dead. http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-m26/m26_C319_comp.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 13, 2005 12:40 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: But an important point to note here is that Rei did not melt down Ritsuko's body. It was already melted down beforehand. In other words, the Rei here is doing something else.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Wed Jul 13, 2005 12:51 pm Datdude, a word in your ear? Red dots are souls. This is blindingly obvious. I mean, as in, a first year film-student would probably whup your ass until it turns purple for doubting it. 1) The core of an Evangelion, or Angel is akin to a red dot. The core is where the soul is located on an Angel. This can be proven, if you doubt. 2) When Adam spread vis wings, the Anti AT-Field that ve generated caused a whole bunch of people to tangify. The souls of those unfortunate people can be seen coruscating around vis wings. 3) The screenshot that Reichu posted - do you not see all the red dots floating around the black moon? 4) The souls that appeared around the Black Moon before everyone turned into tang - well, did you ever consider that those might have been the souls of people who were already long dead? We know that the soul stays with the body, in NGE, but what we don't know is how long. I am willing to theorise that the souls of the dead were drawn into the Black Moon, just as were the living. While this may well be a theory that has huge holes in it, it also may not be. It's one explanation, that may make sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Jul 13, 2005 1:55 pm Soluzar wrote: 4) The souls that appeared around the Black Moon before everyone turned into tang - well, did you ever consider that those might have been the souls of people who were already long dead? We know that the soul stays with the body, in NGE, but what we don't know is how long.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jul 13, 2005 2:05 pm Soluzar wrote: 4) The souls that appeared around the Black Moon before everyone turned into tang - well, did you ever consider that those might have been the souls of people who were already long dead? We know that the soul stays with the body, in NGE, but what we don't know is how long.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Jul 13, 2005 2:08 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: But an important point to note here is that Rei did not melt down Ritsuko's body. It was already melted down beforehand. In other words, the Rei here is doing something else.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Jul 13, 2005 2:56 pm Shin-seiki wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: But an important point to note here is that Rei did not melt down Ritsuko's body. It was already melted down beforehand. In other words, the Rei here is doing something else.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 14, 2005 11:32 am DatDude wrote: On the matter of wether or not the Rei's are melting people and/or collecting soles. The anti AT field was turning people to tang anyway, what reason do the Rei's serve then if not to gather the soles? If people were seeing the Rei's turningto things ( Misato etc) it suggests that they are their to do something other then represent the Anti-AT fild turing people to tang.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jul 14, 2005 11:41 am Hey about those crosses. Why do the evas and sachiel creat crosses???? the evas once activated create them and sachiel just attacks with them, but why???? (for sachiel maybe foreshadowing? as with a lot of things in that episode)

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Thu Jul 14, 2005 11:42 am DatDude wrote: Soluzar wrote: 4) The souls that appeared around the Black Moon before everyone turned into tang - well, did you ever consider that those might have been the souls of people who were already long dead? We know that the soul stays with the body, in NGE, but what we don't know is how long.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 14, 2005 1:17 pm Reichu wrote: Are you paying attention to the movie?

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Thu Jul 14, 2005 1:40 pm DatDude wrote: Reichu wrote: Are you paying attention to the movie?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 14, 2005 2:00 pm DatDude wrote: Reichu wrote: Are you paying attention to the movie?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Jul 14, 2005 3:25 pm Reichu wrote: An Anti ATF must be horribly slow-working, for it to be around for hours and everyone's bodies to be completely intact until they receive the touch of death. (On a similar note, Adam's AATF manifests as things begin to go to hell, yet we see corpses lying around until the Big Boom, whereupon disembodied souls are scattered into the stratosphere.) Again -- discrepancies that must be accounted for somehow.
